_publications._publicationTitle: Capturing the wide variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with eight key factors: a computational study.

_contextSnippet: A non-union resembling a CPT phenotype was predicted by the computational model when all the parameter values were altered according to Table 1 (Nf1 case). Due to the hampered osteogenic and endochondral ossification, a limited number of osteoblasts were formed resulting in a non-union
details: Successfully predicted non-union resembling CPT phenotype when all parameter values were altered according to Nf1 case, with formation of fibrocartilaginous 'hamartoma' filled with chondrocytes and fibroblasts
